title: types: SpaceCreateInput, SpaceQueryInput, SpaceJoinInput, SpaceJoinResponse
description:
What: Add SpaceCreateInput, SpaceQueryInput, SpaceJoinInput, SpaceJoinResponse to mod.rs.

Algorithm:
1. SpaceCreateInput<'a>: client_id: &'a str, name: &'a str, description: Option<&'a str>, icon_blob_id: Option<&'a str>
2. SpaceQueryInput<'a> with Default: filter_name: Option<&'a str>, filter_is_public: Option<bool>, position: Option<u64>, limit: Option<u64>
3. SpaceJoinInput<'a>: invite_code: Option<&'a str>, space_id: Option<&'a str>  — caller must set exactly one
4. SpaceJoinResponse: #[derive(Debug, Deserialize)] #[serde(rename_all=camelCase)]: account_id: String, space_id: String

No Default on SpaceCreateInput (name has no safe default).
SpaceJoinInput has no Default — both fields None is invalid, must be one.

Run cargo fmt, clippy -D warnings, test. Close bead.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test passes; 4 types in mod.rs; clippy clean
close_reason: SpaceCreateInput, SpaceQueryInput, SpaceJoinInput, SpaceJoinResponse added to mod.rs
